arts.sum: And FootballLondon have revealed that upon signing a new contract with Leipzig in June, Sesko secured a gentleman's agreement with his club that will allow him to leave in 2025. Arsenal have been given a big boost to their hopes of signing Benjamin Sesko in 2025 after it was revealed he has a gentleman's agreement to leave Leipzig next year.

arts.ttl: Preview: Norway vs. Slovenia - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Nations League clash between Norway and Slovenia, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
